(NYSE: HAYW), a leading global company specializing in pool equipment and outdoor living technology, will be attending the William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference in Chicago, Illinois on Thursday, June 5, 2025. news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) disclosed receiving approximately $638 million in fresh contracts for intelligence community ventures aimed at bolstering national security measures. John Mengucci, the President and CEO of CACI, highlighted the company's expertise in handling intricate needs for classified clients and its invaluable mission insights crucial to the Intelligence Community. These recent contract wins further solidify CACI's positioning as a leading provider of specialized services to support intelligence and national security initiatives.
news.headline: CACI secures $638M in new contracts for intelligence community work, highlighting its expertise and value.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) was recently recognized as an innovation and growth Leader in the 2025 Frost Radar™: Cloud and Application Runtime Security. They ranked the highest among all vendors on the Innovation Index. Frost & Sullivan distinguished CrowdStrike as the sole CNAPP providing unified, real-time protection across cloud, identity, and endpoint. This is essential for preventing cloud breaches, especially as adversaries focus on modern hybrid environments.

news.summary: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. announced its financial results for Q1 2025, reporting a cash balance of $9.9 million by March 31, 2025, compared to $0.1 million by December 31, 2024. The company raised $15 million in private financing and received a $2.0 million grant from CPRIT for their REYOBIQ CNS cancer radiotherapeutic trials. They added industry veteran Kyle Guse to the Board and Dr. Michael Rosol as Chief Development Officer. Plus Therapeutics presented updated interim data on REYOBIQ at a conference in Vienna, showing potential efficacy in treating glioblastoma patients. They completed the ReSPECT-LM Phase 1 trial and received U.S. FDA orphan drug designation for REYOBIQ in treating leptomeningeal metastases. The company also announced key leadership appointments for their CNSide CSF assay platform launch readiness. The total operating loss for Q1 2025 was $3.5 million, with a net loss of $17.4 million. Plus Therapeutics is working on developing targeted radiotherapeutics for CNS cancers and aims to enhance clinical outcomes. The REYOBIQ platform is focused on treating recurrent glioblastoma and leptomeningeal metastases, with advancements supported by NCI and CPRIT grants. The CNSide CSF assay platform is designed to identify tumor cells in patients with CNS metastases. They are planning to commercialize CNSide in the U.S. in 2025. Plus Therapeutics emphasizes that their forward-looking statements are subject to risks and uncertainties, and shareholders should be cautious. For more information, visit their website.
news.headline: Plus Therapeutics reported Q1 2025 results: cash balance $9.9M, $15M raised in financing, $2M grant, $17.4M net loss, and more.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Quanex Building Products Corporation revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share for its common stock (NYSE:NX). This dividend will be paid on June 30, 2025, to shareholders recorded on June 16, 2025.
news.headline: Quanex Building Products sets quarterly dividend at $0.08/share for shareholders, payable on June 30, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 4.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. This growth can be attributed to increased consumer spending, which rose by 6.5%. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. Analysts predict that this positive trend will continue in the coming months, leading to further improvements in the overall economic landscape.
news.headline: Quarterly financials & recent biz highlights shared by Plus Therapeutics, showing progress.

news.summary: LAS VEGAS, today, Jena Acquisition Corporation II (referred to as "Jena II") completed its initial public offering of 23,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit, with 3,000,000 units from the underwriters' over-allotment option, totaling $230,000,000 in gross proceeds. Trading on the NY Stock Exchange started on May 29, 2025, under "JENA.U". Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one right, granting the holder one-twentieth of a Class A ordinary share post an initial business combination. The separate trading of Class A ordinary shares and rights is anticipated within 52 days, with symbols "JENA" and "JENA.R" respectively on the NYSE.
news.headline: Jena Acquisition Corp II raises $230 million in IPO with 23,000,000 units at $10 each. Trading on NYSE as "JENA.U".

news.summary: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. disclosed in Athens, Greece on May 30, 2025 that the 2025 Annual Meeting of the Shareholders had successfully taken place. The company, trading under the tickers NYSE:ECO and OSE:OET, confirmed that all items on the agenda were voted upon and approved at the meeting.
news.headline: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. held its 2025 Annual Shareholders Meeting; all proposals approved on May 30, 2025.

news.summary: In West Des Moines, Iowa, on May 30, 2025, Athene Holding Ltd. disclosed plans to repurchase all existing shares of its 6.375% Fixed-Rate Reset Perpetual Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series C. This includes the redemption of depositary shares (CUSIP: 04686J 309; ISIN: US04686J3095) which equate to a fractional ownership of the Series C Preferred Stock.
news.headline: Athene to redeem all Series C Preferred Stock and Depositary Shares in West Des Moines, Iowa, with 6.375% Fixed-Rate, 1/1,000th interest each.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in Akron, Ohio, the Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company (NASDAQ: GT) announced its involvement in a fireside chat at TD Cowen's 9th Annual Future of The Consumer Conference on June 4, 2025, scheduled for 8:45 a.m. ET. Itay Michaeli, a senior analyst at TD Cowen, will be hosting the chat.
news.headline: Goodyear (NASDAQ: GT) to join TD Cowen's conference on June 4, 2025 at 8:45 a.m. ET. Itay Michaeli to host fireside chat.

news.summary: A major media company, Walt Disney Co (NYSE: DIS), has introduced a new rewards program for streaming subscribers, incorporating non-fungible tokens (NFTs). This initiative includes discounts at certain retailers and exclusive experiences for Disney+ subscribers, with a similar program planned for Hulu subscribers during the summer. Additionally, subscribers will have access to Disney Pinnacle by Dapper Labs, an NFT collection platform. As part of the program, subscribers will receive a free monthly Mystery Capsule for an undisclosed period. Moreover, Disney+ subscribers have the opportunity to receive a $10 Dapper Labs credit until June 26. Disney+ Executive Vice President, Marketing Samantha Rosenberg expressed gratitude towards fans for their loyalty to the service, stating that the Perks program aims to recognize and reward their dedication.
news.headline: Disney is offering free NFTs to streaming subscribers like Disney+. They receive discounts, unique experiences, and monthly Mystery Capsules. They can also access Disney Pinnacle NFT marketplace and get a $10 Dapper Labs credit until June 26. Disney+ subscribers will get these perks.

news.summary: TechTarget, Inc. (Nasdaq: TTGT) was recently notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC that it is not meeting Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to a delayed filing of its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending March 31, 2025. This notice was received on May 27, 2025. TechTarget, Inc., operating as Informa TechTarget, is currently addressing this matter to regain compliance with the rules and regulations.
news.headline: Informa TechTarget (Nasdaq: TTGT) notified of non-compliance with Nasdaq rule due to delayed 10-Q filing.

news.summary: Box, a prominent Intelligent Content Management (ICM) platform listed on NYSE under the symbol BOX, revealed that its management executives are scheduled to speak at the William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference. The event is set to take place on June 3, 2025, at 1:20pm CT in Loews Chicago Hotel, Chicago. Those interested can tune in to the live webcast of the conference at boxinvestorrelations.com. Additionally, a replay of the event will be accessible roughly an hour after its conclusion.
news.headline: Box will present at William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference on June 3, 2025, 1:20pm CT in Chicago. Event livestreamed at boxinvestorrelations.com.

news.summary: Klear.ai, based in Cypress, California, continues to prioritize client results, sustainable innovation, and enduring trust despite market trends. Amid significant changes in policy, risk management, and claims processing, Klear.ai stands out as competitors in the industry merge under private equity firms. The company's commitment to long-term success is highlighted as of May 30, 2025.
news.headline: Klear.ai stands out from competitors by focusing on client outcomes and long-term trust, not quarterly returns.

news.summary: FARE CEO Sung Poblete, PhD, RN, expressed backing for bipartisan action post-Mind Meld Innovation Summit. The effort aims to boost prevention and fast-track cures for diseases, with a focus on food allergy. The statement was issued in MCLEAN, Va. on May 30, 2025.
news.headline: FARE CEO supports American Center for Cures to advance prevention and cures for diseases.

news.summary: In Chicago, Illinois on May 30, 2025, Vaniam Group unveiled the introduction of Vaniam Intelligence, a cutting-edge platform. This innovation combines in-house artificial intelligence technology with human proficiency to revolutionize the processes involved in the development of biopharma products.
news.headline: Vaniam Group launches Vaniam Intelligence, blending AI with human expertise for biopharma. Announced on May 30, 2025.

news.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon has issued a warning about a potential storm brewing in the bond market, expressing concerns about the financial system's vulnerability to a sudden fracture due to excessive debt and monetary expansion. Dimon predicts a crack in the bond market, emphasizing that a dislocation is looming, which could cause panic among regulators and market participants. Speaking at the Reagan National Defense Forum, Dimon revealed that the U.S. has accumulated $10 trillion in borrowing and spending since 2020, with the Federal Reserve increasing its balance sheet by $8 trillion through quantitative easing, supported by a similar amount from global central banks. These significant numbers underscore the magnitude of the situation, as per Dimon's insights.
news.headline: Jamie Dimon warns of potential bond market crisis due to $10 trillion US debt since 2020, with $8 trillion added by Federal Reserve.

news.summary: PBS and a Minnesota public TV station recently filed a lawsuit in a federal court in Washington, alleging that President Trump's executive order is unconstitutional.
news.headline: PBS and a Minnesota public TV station file lawsuit against Trump's funding cut order, citing unconstitutionality.

news.summary: Today in Dallas, Triumph Financial, Inc. (Nasdaq: TFIN) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $17.81 per share on its 7.125% Series C Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock. This dividend applies to depositary shares (Nasdaq: TFINP), with each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of preferred stock. Holders of these depositary shares are set to receive $0.44525 per depositary share. The dividend payment is scheduled for June 30, 2025, and will be distributed to holders of record at the closing of business on June 15, 2025.
news.headline: Triumph Financial declares a $17.81 dividend on 7.125% Series C Preferred Stock, $0.44525 per depositary share, payable June 30.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Coca-Cola Beverages Florida, LLC (Coke Florida) observed its significant 10-year milestone on May 29, 2025. Commencing its operations in 2015, the company has seen remarkable growth and development over the past decade, highlighting its dedication to the communities in Florida. Initially focused on central Florida, Coke Florida expanded rapidly, acquiring operations in both north and south Florida within just 22 months of its founding. Currently, as a family-owned enterprise, the company holds exclusive distribution rights in a vast territory extending from Ja...

news.summary: In its fourth quarter report ending on March 31, 2025, AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AWF) disclosed total net assets of $966,409,431, a slight decrease from $978,431,163 on December 31, 2024, and similar to the $966,421,294 recorded on March 31, 2024. The net asset value per share stood at $11.21 as of March 31, 2025, with a total of 86,229,677 shares of common stock in circulation. This information was made available on Benzinga.com, detailing the financial performance of the registered closed-end investment company.

news.summary: At the recent Annual Meeting of the American Spinal Injury Association, NurExone revealed its upcoming clinical trial strategy for a therapy aimed at treating acute spinal cord injuries. The company plans to conduct this trial utilizing a sample size of 200 patients across multiple research sites. The therapy shows promising results in preclinical studies and aims to provide a potential breakthrough in the treatment of spinal cord injuries. The announcement generated significant interest among attendees at the event, highlighting the importance of this initiative in the medical community.
news.headline: NurExone reveals clinical trial strategy for spinal cord injury therapy at American Spinal Injury Association meeting.

news.summary: A company has joined five other major corporate partners, including AB InBev, The Coca-Cola Company, Colgate-Palmolive, Danone, and Unilever, to become the sixth member in this group. This partnership signifies a strategic alliance among prominent companies in the industry.

news.summary: In Toronto and Seattle, POSaBIT Systems Corporation (CSE: PBIT, OTC: POSAF) disclosed its financial performance for the three months up to March 31, 2025. The company, known for its payment solutions in the cannabis sector, stated that they maintained a stable quarter. They reported consistent adjusted gross margins and unchanging adjusted EBITDA compared to the prior quarter. This information was shared following the recent annual earnings call by POSaBIT.

news.summary: Panama City Beach, FL - On May 30, 2025, The Dolphin Company, a leading operator of aquatic theme parks worldwide, announced the temporary closure of its Gulf World facility located in Panama City Beach, Florida. news.summary: Today, a Hawai'i-based company, Alexander & Baldwin, Inc. news.summary: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Vancouver and Boston, disclosed on May 30, 2025, that they have provided equity inducement grants to seven new non-officer employees. These inducements were deemed crucial for the employees who recently joined the company and were granted as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on May 29, 2025.
news.headline: Xenon Pharmaceuticals grants 53,550 share options to 7 new non-officer employees on May 29, 2025 under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
